subject: session date
fact: The session date is Dec 7th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 7th, 2025

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is a familiar sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar.
source_quote: The party returned to the familiar sinkhole known as The Waydown, a half-day's journey from Hillsfar

subject: The Waydown entrance
fact: A partially built wall now surrounds the entrance to The Waydown.
source_quote: they found a partially built wall surrounding the entrance

subject: Two Red Plume soldiers
fact: Two nervous soldiers in splint armor are guarding the entrance to The Waydown.
source_quote: guarded by two nervous soldiers in splint armor

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the Red Plumes who returned to Hillsfar.
source_quote: Their commander, Vuhm Yestral, had returned to the city

subject: Red Plumes
fact: A larger contingent of the Red Plumes accompanied Vuhm Yestral back to the city.
source_quote: returned to the city with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes

subject: Owlbear companion
fact: The party enhanced the Owlbear companion with magical gloves to make its attacks more powerful.
source_quote: They enhanced their Owlbear companion with magical gloves that would make its attacks more powerful

subject: enchanted goggles
fact: Daein purchased a pair of enchanted goggles to see in the darkness.
source_quote: Daein, the only member of the party without natural darkvision, finally purchased a pair of enchanted goggles

subject: Daein
fact: Daein is the only party member without natural darkvision.
source_quote: Daein, the only member of the party without natural darkvision

subject: descent into Underdark
fact: The party descended a hundred-foot drop to a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: they descended the hundred-foot drop to the swift-flowing underground river

subject: journey to Howling Pits
fact: The party began a two-day journey to the Howling Pits.
source_quote: began their two-day journey to the Howling Pits

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided accurate directions and a map for the journey.
source_quote: guided by Murssvayas's accurate directions and map

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The party detected a faint piping sound echoing through the caves as they approached the Howling Pits.
source_quote: As they approached the Howling Pits, they detected a faint piping sound echoing through the caves

subject: fire giants
fact: Two massive fire giants ambushed the party in a large cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: the party was suddenly ambushed by two massive fire giants who leaped from behind stalactites

subject: winged fire giant
fact: One of the fire giants possessed leathery wings too small for flight.
source_quote: one possessed leathery wings too small for flight

subject: cyclopean fire giant
fact: One of the fire giants had an extra eye.
source_quote: while the other had an extra eye

subject: Felkur's spell failure
fact: Felkur attempted to strike a giant with magic, but the attack was ineffective.
source_quote: Felkur attempted to strike one with magic, but the attack proved remarkably ineffective

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned radiant guardians to protect the party and create an aura that slowed the giants.
source_quote: Bramgrim positioned himself strategically and summoned radiant guardians to protect the party, creating an aura that slowed the giants' movements

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was struck by a critical blow and fell unconscious and bleeding.
source_quote: one of the giants landed a critical blow that sent Bramgrim crashing to the ground, unconscious and bleeding

subject: Daein
fact: Daein grabbed the fallen Bramgrim to help him disengage from combat.
source_quote: Daein grabbed the fallen Bramgrim

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas helped Felkur disengage from combat.
source_quote: while Akritas helped Felkur

subject: party retreat
fact: The party made the decision to flee the combat with the fire giants.
source_quote: The party quickly realized they were outmatched and made the difficult decision to flee

subject: giants mocking retreat
fact: The giants laughed mockingly at the party's retreat.
source_quote: The giants laughed mockingly at their retreat

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim regained consciousness after the fight, confused and shaken.
source_quote: After Bramgrim regained consciousness, confused and shaken by what had happened

subject: stealth bypass plan
fact: Bramgrim suggested using stealth to bypass the giants rather than engaging them directly.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggested using stealth to bypass the giants rather than engaging them directly

subject: Akritas' masking spell
fact: Akritas wove a spell that would mask the party's movements.
source_quote: Akritas wove a spell that would mask their movements

subject: party sneaking past giants
fact: The party managed to sneak past the giants successfully.
source_quote: the party managed to sneak past the giants successfully

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur stumbled while the party was sneaking past the giants.
source_quote: despite a stumble from Felkur

subject: saving companions from stirring giant
fact: Akritas and Daein swiftly pulled their companions to safety when one giant briefly stirred.
source_quote: with Akritas and Daein swiftly pulling their companions to safety when one giant briefly stirred

subject: pit-filled section
fact: The party encountered a treacherous section filled with dangerously deep pits.
source_quote: a treacherous section filled with dangerously deep pits

subject: Daein grants flight
fact: Daein used his magical abilities to grant himself flight.
source_quote: Daein used his magical abilities to grant himself flight

subject: party crossing pits
fact: Daein transferred each party member across the hazardous terrain one by one.
source_quote: then transferred each party member across the hazardous terrain one by one

subject: wide cave with river
fact: The party reached a wide cave bisected by a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: They soon reached a wide cave bisected by a swift-flowing underground river

subject: Cave Creepers
fact: Strange gray and white fungi covering the banks were identified as Cave Creepers.
source_quote: the fungi were Cave Creepers

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas failed to identify the fungus on the river banks.
source_quote: When Akritas attempted to identify the fungus, she failed

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim explained that Cave Creepers would drive anyone mad if touched.
source_quote: Bramgrim smugly explained that the fungi were Cave Creepers, which would drive anyone mad if touched

subject: flying over river
fact: The party decided to fly over the river to avoid the fungi.
source_quote: The party carefully discussed their options and decided to fly over the river

subject: Daein transfers party over river
fact: Daein used his powers to transfer everyone across the river while avoiding contact with the fungi.
source_quote: with Daein once again using his powers to transfer everyone across while meticulously avoiding contact with the dangerous fungi

subject: yellow mold tunnel
fact: The party entered a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold.
source_quote: the party entered a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold

subject: wind picking up
fact: The wind suddenly picked up in the yellow mold tunnel, threatening to spread poisonous spores.
source_quote: the wind suddenly picked up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores into the air

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas identified the yellow mold spores as toxic.
source_quote: Akritas recognized the danger just in time, identifying the spores as toxic

subject: party holding breath
fact: The party decided to hold their breath and rush through the affected area.
source_quote: The party decided to hold their breath and rush through the affected area

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim suffered some effects from the poison despite his natural resistance.
source_quote: Bramgrim, despite his natural resistance, suffered some effects before ultimately overcoming them

subject: poison cleared
fact: The wind carried the poison away, making the area safe to continue.
source_quote: Once the wind carried the poison away, they were safe to continue
